name: Beef Stew (Not Just the Regular)
recipeIngredient: 2 Cubes beef bouillon (dissolved in 2 cups boiling water)
recipeInstructions:
1. Dredge the beef in flour.
2. Melt butter and oil in a large pot; add garlic.
3. Cook the beef until it reaches rare doneness; remove from the pot and refrigerate.
4. Add wine and dissolved bouillon to the pan and scrape up any bits stuck to the bottom.
5. Add potato, onion, thyme, and bay leaf. Bring to a boil, cover, and simmer for 1 hour.
6. Add potatoes, carrots, celery, and onions; simmer for an additional half hour.
7. Add tomato juice as needed for a nice gravy.
8. Reheat the beef cubes; toss in parsley and serve.
